summary: Iteration 13 retest: All 3 previously-failing iter11 billing tests now PASS after fixture fix (fresh_user and quota_user fixtures admin-downgrade newly-registered users to 'free' before running quota tests). Full iter8-12 regression sweep: 56/56 PASS. Frontend Products page tier gating verified: free-tier sees 'Bulk Pack 🔒' (bulk-pack-locked) navigating to /pricing; pro-tier sees 'Bulk Card Pack' (bulk-pack-btn) with href=/api/og/bulk-pack.zip. Sari reverted to free after test.
critical_code_review_comments: test files (iter9, iter10) still call os.environ.get('REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL').rstrip('/') without a None-guard; they crash on collection if env var is not pre-exported. iter11/iter12 have a fallback reading /app/frontend/.env. Consider standardizing via a shared conftest.py BASE_URL fixture.
server.py still >2000 lines; recommend splitting into routers (as noted prior iteration).
Trial auto-downgrade runs on every authenticated request inside require_user — acceptable at current scale but a candidate for caching.
test_credentials: admin@lapakin.id / lapakin123 and sari@warung.id / newpass123. Sari tier was flipped pro→free during test and confirmed reverted.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_quota_* and TEST_aiquota_* users created by iter11 fixtures; one TEST_iter12sanity_* user for sanity check. All remain in DB but cleanly prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter11 regressions fixed. iter12 sanity verified: /api/auth/register → /api/billing/me returns tier='pro', trial=true, trial_expires_at=~now+14d. Products page tier gating correctly shows bulk-pack-locked for free users and bulk-pack-btn for paid users. Regression baseline (iter8-12) is 56/56 green.
rca_of_the_issue: Prior iter11 regression was caused by iter12 introducing trial=pro on register; main agent fixed by admin-downgrading to free in both fresh_user and quota_user fixtures before quota assertions. Retest confirms fix works.
